title: canonical_document_schema
description: Controlled baseline schema for the canonical document intelligence model. This schema represents one logical document. Multi-document manifests may produce multiple canonical documents without breaking this baseline contract. The schema is expanded to support document-level routing, evaluation, and provider-traceability metadata while preserving stable downstream compatibility.

ingestion_timestamp.description: Document ingestion timestamp in ISO 8601 format.

pages.description: Page-level content aligned to the governed page schema.

routing_summary.description: Optional document-level routing traceability summary, including provider selection, fallback usage, and accepted capability path.

evaluation_summary.description: Optional document-level evaluation summary, including quality, completeness, and benchmark metadata.

metadata.description: Document-level canonical metadata, including pipeline summaries, enrichment summaries, lineage, provider traceability, and extensible control metadata.
